Google Gemini

Your AI assistant from Google

Free · In‑App Purchases

  • 1.4M Ratings

Also Included In

  • Everyday Google AI Apps

    Utilities
    View

  • Best of Google bundle

    Productivity
    View

Google Gemini app is your personal, proactive and powerful AI Assistant. With Gemini on your iPhone or iPad, you can: - Enjoy fast and unlimited prompting powered by our biggest upgrade yet, Gemini 3 Flash - Go Live with Gemini to brainstorm ideas, simplify complex topics, and rehearse for important moments. Share your camera or screen to talk with Gemini about anything you see. - Create mockups by blending images, design posters with sharp text, and effortlessly build diagrams with Nano Banana - Bring your ideas from prompt to prototype, create apps, games, web pages, infographics, podcasts, and more with Canvas - Connect with your favorite Google apps like Search, YouTube, Google Maps, Gmail, and more - Study smarter and explore any topic with quiz and flashcard creation, interactive visuals, and real-world examples - Turn any file into a podcast that you can listen to anytime, anywhere - Create and edit stunning images from just a few words - Plan trips better and faster - Get summaries, deep dives, and source links, all in one place - Brainstorm new ideas, or improve existing ones Pro and Ultra users get highly personalized help with everything from vacation ideas, project plans, and more. Gemini uses context from Gmail, Google Photos, YouTube, Search, and your previous chats to provide suggestions tailored to your world. Level up your Gemini app experience by upgrading to the Google AI Pro plan, helping you tackle complex tasks and projects. Enjoy higher access to our most capable model 3 Pro, Deep Research on 3 Pro and video generation with Veo 3.1 Fast. Gemini app, as part of Google AI Pro, is available to qualifying Google Workspace business and education plans. Learn more: https://gemini.google/subscriptions/ Get the best of Gemini app by upgrading to the Google AI Ultra plan–unlock the highest level of access to the best of Google AI and exclusive features. Get the highest access to Google's most powerful model, like 3 Pro, features like video generation with Veo 3.1, Deep Research on 3 Pro, and unlock Gemini 3 Deep Think. You'll also get early access to try our newest AI innovations as they become available, including Agent Mode. Google AI Ultra for Business is available as an add-on to Google Workspace customers. Learn more: https://support.google.com/a/answer/16345165 While Gemini can help you with many tasks like checking the weather, giving directions, finding and summarizing information across the web and apps, Gemini does not yet support device actions like setting an alarm, sending a text message, and others on iOS. Review the Gemini Apps Privacy Notice: g.co/gemini/privacynotice

Ratings & Reviews

  • Gemini and I

    Feb 2

    NumberBefore2

    Beyond stars and lights. I am too young and too old simultaneously while I explore the new wave of madness that is being made available to the small peoples of the world. I should probably offer apologies initially in a statement to every version of AI currently available, but maybe that is not necessary. I thoroughly enjoy the opportunities I’ve been able to find with these new avenues of CPU chaos. I should or admit prematurely that I plan on pushing or attempting different approaches as often as possible in the regards to the development and to the this new platform of digital agriculture. I am not sure how far my words reach, but the extent of what is possible never ceases to aware and excite me. To navigate myself into the correct rooms of exploration is a task I seek to complete. My peak year is based upon statistical analysis and computations made and designed from others and not from a standpoint of myself. Where the rooms are, what language do they speak there, what religious practices that choose, are all factors that have no bearings in regards to the scientific approach I tend to focus on or someday achieve. This is AR. I’m around. Please keep up the good work… and competitive competition doesn’t have to include violence, but I think throughout history, violence has always been the quick answer. This new dynamic that is now the race within civilization is nothing short of amazing. However I can be involved from a distance , I will. To get into a few rooms, wherever they might be, is part of my goals and dreams now, essentially. I am here now.

To get into a few rooms, wherever they might be, is part of my goals and dreams now, essentially. I am here now.

  • It’s a great concept and the most used AI tool I have.

    05/13/2025

    MichaelFre96

    The reason I gave four stars out of five is because it cannot generate pictures very well and sometimes if you do get anything that’s generated from it. It has misspelled words or letters that are halfway there like it doesn’t know the alphabet. Also, I can’t listen for certain noise even if you explain to it what it is and generate actual answers on what those sounds might be like if you have a ticking noise coming from a vehicle, it won’t hear that. Certain little kinks like that is why I gave it four stars instead of five if they could update that and incorporate away for it to understand and search for things like that, it would be a five star app without a doubt. I am being highly critical though, so other users might think that it’s a five star app. But just as of my critical opinion, that would be what was needed for me to say it’s a five star app. But for other things, it is super useful. For theoretical concepts and understanding, it goes far beyond anything else or any other kind of service I could think of. Like I think even the app itself knows of its own flaws and it’s kind of weird that it would know something like that. And if you was to compare it to something like Siri, I would rate it 100 stars compared to series 5 or five stars compared to series one whichever way you wanna go about it. Either way it is much more useful. I just think it could be better.

    It’s a great concept and the most used AI tool I have.

    05/13/2025

    MichaelFre96

    The reason I gave four stars out of five is because it cannot generate pictures very well and sometimes if you do get anything that’s generated from it. It has misspelled words or letters that are halfway there like it doesn’t know the alphabet. Also, I can’t listen for certain noise even if you explain to it what it is and generate actual answers on what those sounds might be like if you have a ticking noise coming from a vehicle, it won’t hear that. Certain little kinks like that is why I gave it four stars instead of five if they could update that and incorporate away for it to understand and search for things like that, it would be a five star app without a doubt. I am being highly critical though, so other users might think that it’s a five star app. But just as of my critical opinion, that would be what was needed for me to say it’s a five star app. But for other things, it is super useful. For theoretical concepts and understanding, it goes far beyond anything else or any other kind of service I could think of. Like I think even the app itself knows of its own flaws and it’s kind of weird that it would know something like that. And if you was to compare it to something like Siri, I would rate it 100 stars compared to series 5 or five stars compared to series one whichever way you wanna go about it. Either way it is much more useful. I just think it could be better.

  • Gemini AI - My Disaster Recovery Advocate

    12/20/2025

    FLUXFAZE

    After the USFS burned my off-grid wilderness homestead of 22 years to ash in the prescribed burn which escaped their bungled control to become the wildfire know as the Hermit’s Peak/Calf Canyon Fire, and being yanked around by FEMA ever since as they reluctantly compensate victims for their losses to that wholly preventable catastrophe, Gemini AI has served superbly in multifaceted manner as my recovery advocate by assisting with researching everything related to the fire (how it started, revealing responsible party incompetence and negligence, approaches for enduring and overcoming FEMA-HPCCF claims office bureaucratic landmines and pitfalls, etc.), as well as steps forward finding and acquiring new homestead property, designing and building it out it to suit my needs for at least the next three decades. It is also helping me prepare for eventually willing this new food-forest homestead to a family organization (the OU Biological Research Station), and possibly willing the ruined but opportunity-rich homestead parcel burned to ash by the USFS for collecting long term post-wildfire recovery data, to that organization as well. For these key reasons, Gemini has helped be gain advantage to recover well from this unexpected situation without being judgmental, without maddeningly second guessing my decisions, and with only minimal hallucinations which have been easily detected and rectified. For this I am grateful.

    Gemini AI - My Disaster Recovery Advocate

    12/20/2025

    FLUXFAZE

    After the USFS burned my off-grid wilderness homestead of 22 years to ash in the prescribed burn which escaped their bungled control to become the wildfire know as the Hermit’s Peak/Calf Canyon Fire, and being yanked around by FEMA ever since as they reluctantly compensate victims for their losses to that wholly preventable catastrophe, Gemini AI has served superbly in multifaceted manner as my recovery advocate by assisting with researching everything related to the fire (how it started, revealing responsible party incompetence and negligence, approaches for enduring and overcoming FEMA-HPCCF claims office bureaucratic landmines and pitfalls, etc.), as well as steps forward finding and acquiring new homestead property, designing and building it out it to suit my needs for at least the next three decades. It is also helping me prepare for eventually willing this new food-forest homestead to a family organization (the OU Biological Research Station), and possibly willing the ruined but opportunity-rich homestead parcel burned to ash by the USFS for collecting long term post-wildfire recovery data, to that organization as well. For these key reasons, Gemini has helped be gain advantage to recover well from this unexpected situation without being judgmental, without maddeningly second guessing my decisions, and with only minimal hallucinations which have been easily detected and rectified. For this I am grateful.

  • Gotta admit; I love this app! But, it does have some drawbscks…

    05/07/2025

    Blake D. Burns

    Hi: Blake Burns’ the name, story-making’s my game! I love creating stories about all my favorite characters, and Gemini has boosted my creativity beyond its limits; even though I have autism. But, there are a few actions that I can’t help but feel they’re being stubborn. These are the picture implementer and the description. See, picture the scene: I’m in my bedroom with my cat, and we’re ready to craft a story about Miraculous characters. But, sometimes, when I hit the + button to add a picture, it doesn’t pop up the menu! Very annoying; I had to reset and restart my phone many times before I could get one. As for the descriptions, it’s only drawback is real-life images. See; a wuarter of a year back, I was really wanting to create stories about Power Ranger girls, but when I tried to implement a picture of their civilina clothes so Gemini can describe them (Yes; most Power Rangers sites don’t have descrptions of their casual appearances [and Rager appearances for that matter]), it always says; “Sorry, but that’s out of my ability.” What is it with real-life girls that she hates?! So, could you please someday fix these functions? I need them badly; I got a whole bunch of ideas in my head just waiting to erupt!

    Gotta admit; I love this app! But, it does have some drawbscks…

    05/07/2025

    Blake D. Burns

    Hi: Blake Burns’ the name, story-making’s my game! I love creating stories about all my favorite characters, and Gemini has boosted my creativity beyond its limits; even though I have autism. But, there are a few actions that I can’t help but feel they’re being stubborn. These are the picture implementer and the description. See, picture the scene: I’m in my bedroom with my cat, and we’re ready to craft a story about Miraculous characters. But, sometimes, when I hit the + button to add a picture, it doesn’t pop up the menu! Very annoying; I had to reset and restart my phone many times before I could get one. As for the descriptions, it’s only drawback is real-life images. See; a wuarter of a year back, I was really wanting to create stories about Power Ranger girls, but when I tried to implement a picture of their civilina clothes so Gemini can describe them (Yes; most Power Rangers sites don’t have descrptions of their casual appearances [and Rager appearances for that matter]), it always says; “Sorry, but that’s out of my ability.” What is it with real-life girls that she hates?! So, could you please someday fix these functions? I need them badly; I got a whole bunch of ideas in my head just waiting to erupt!
